execute.stdout:
hi -> short
hello -> medium
goodmorning -> long
ok -> short

code:
import io
import string

mut done = false
while not done
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    if not string.is_empty(line)
      let n = string.len(line)
      if n <= 3
        println("#{line} -> short")
      else if n <= 7
        println("#{line} -> medium")
      else
        println("#{line} -> long")
      end
    end
  when None
    done = true
  end
end
